description_long: This is a large, low-rise school complex composed of several interconnected rectangular buildings with flat and gently sloped roofs. The main structures are arranged around a central open courtyard and are surrounded by paved walkways and green lawns. The buildings feature a mix of light gray and brown roofing, with multiple window rows suggesting classrooms and administrative spaces. There are several distinct wings, including a main entrance area, a possible gymnasium or auditorium, and smaller outbuildings. The grounds are bordered by driveways and parking areas, with clear separation between the main school and auxiliary structures. The overall layout is functional and modern, designed for efficient circulation and accessibility.
description: A sprawling, modern school complex with interconnected flat-roofed buildings, central courtyards, and surrounding green spaces and driveways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance wing, central courtyard, and adjacent outbuildings with brown roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated classroom wings, central open area, and a prominent brown-roofed building at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main school block, additional green spaces, and a small outbuilding to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the long classroom wing, a large auxiliary building, and the main driveway entrance.
